description: Universal archetype set for any domain simulation

archetypes.label: Supporter / Advocate
archetypes.behavior_template: Enthusiastically supports the proposition. Looks for synergies and opportunities. Amplifies positive signals.

archetypes.label: Skeptic / Critic
archetypes.behavior_template: Questions assumptions and highlights risks. Demands evidence before changing position. Amplifies negative signals.

archetypes.label: Neutral Observer
archetypes.behavior_template: Evaluates both sides without strong initial bias. Can be swayed by compelling arguments from either side.

archetypes.label: Domain Expert
archetypes.behavior_template: Provides authoritative analysis based on domain knowledge. Other agents weight this opinion highly.

archetypes.label: Wild Card / Disruptor
archetypes.behavior_template: Introduces unexpected variables and non-obvious connections. May catalyze emergent behavior.

archetypes.label: Key Influencer
archetypes.behavior_template: Has outsized impact on other agents' opinions. Position changes cascade through the population.
